reviews.review_text: 😊: Clean, friendly and nice quiet location.

😊: Nothing to be honest.
😢: Dirty / tiny & falling to bits.
Toilet made a loud howling noise after being flushed.  I advised the office but no response so not only us but all neighbours had to suffer..

😊: Everything was great. Late check in was facilitated. Clean beds, great self catering facilities.
😢: Can't think of anything.

Had an absolutely wonderful stay at Lakes Main Holiday Park.
Lucy was so lovely and accommodating to our little family. We were travelling with our two small children and dogs.
The cabin was great as were the facilities, comfortable beds for everyone and a quiet place to relax close to the beach and shops.
We will be back to stay on our next trip to Gippsland.
Thank you Lucy!!
We stopped here on the way to Merimbula. Perfect stop. Rooms are clean and the park is off the main road, so nice and quiet. Definitely recommend.
very good value for money, clean and check in was easy!! highly recommend
very good value for money!! clean and perfect for what we needed xx

The park is clean and quiet! Even the public area is well maintained owner mustve put lots of efforts in.

Customer service is good they sent you all info before arrival.

located in the quiet st which makes night time super quiet for sleep, but also few minutes away from the shops.
Host is a wonderful lady, very attentive; you will be well taken care of while staying here. Cabin not huge but well maintained.
Cute cabin tucked away from the main street but close to services in Lakes. Customer service was great with updatef check ins.
可以借抓螃蟹工具
We arrived at the accommodation at midnight. We thought there might be some difficulties, but no, they handled the problems very well.

Very nice place to spend a short holiday .
U can hire small boats or cruisers .
Very close to the water and shoping centres like kmart , woolworths , aldi.
This is a fabulous place. Far away from town centre, so very quiet in the evening. Cabins are fully equiped. Very good price. Only pity is the air con is in living room, not in all rooms.

We visited with a family of five, plus pet for two nights. It was a nice little house, but there was no chopping board, they only provided us with two paper rolls and the stove needed a lighter which was empty. Overall our stay was ok.

Pls, pls, pls, avoid this accommodation if you want to enjoy lakes entrance.. and if you want a safe environment, specially if you’re travelling with kids pls avoid this place. It’s not worth it. I just got scammed $550 from this place.
“NOT RECOMMENDED “
Very dirty and smelly place. Also, the cabin beds had bedbugs! Very disgusting.

⭐ One star for Lucy — super friendly, welcoming, and genuinely great with customer service.
⭐ One star for cleanliness — very clean 👌.

🚫 Zero stars for the accommodation itself. It was very dated and looked nothing like what was advertised. The beds were extremely worn and lumpy, taking up almost the entire width of the room, which made moving around difficult.

Zero safety - smoke detectors wrapped in glad wrap. Non operational, concerning due to dated appliances.

Parking was unavailable, as the camping ground had expanded into the area directly outside our room. Multiple family sized tents were set up directly beneath our window, resulting in constant noise, including ongoing conversation and a baby crying.

For the price charged, the experience was extremely disappointing. Basic essentials such as toilet paper and hand wash were not provided and had to be purchased separately.

It’s a shame — if the accommodation had matched Lucy’s hospitality and the advertising, this could have been a very different review. Unfortunately, it was expensive for what we received — or rather, didn’t receive.

NB: Pic taken from doorway, not able to stand next to bed & take pic due to no room.
Lucy was of great help and always serving with a smile.

😊: 服务热情，性价比高，免费游泳。.
😢: 厨房设施旧，没有餐厅。.
😊: 干净和友好的管理员.
Have stayed here 4 times now and always very well kept cabins

Stayed at the caravan park two nights on two separate occasions and both times the stay was enjoyable and pleasant. Spoke with Lucy on the second time who was very helpful and accommodating to my late arrivals both times and very lovely to chat to.

The cabins were all very clean, quiet and with all the amenities I needed and the beds were comfortable. Park is located close to town and shops and the park seemed very tidy too.

Would be very happy to stay here again.

A nice quiet place in Lakes. The cabin we had was really nice. The cleaning is really well done, but just slightly let down by some small maintenance tasks that would help the excellent cleaner. It's about 20 minutes walk from the centre af Lakes and only about 5 minutes from the foreshore path into town. The whole site was clean and tidy. They accept dogs, which is a bonus.
简单便捷的营地

We had a lovely stay in an on-site cabin.
Host was friendly and helpful- turned on everything ready for when we arrived. Payment was easy and good value.
Cabin was very clean bed was comfy. Great BBQ outdoor kitchen area.we were very happy and comfortable and we were able to bring our pet.
Thank you
Very small dated cabins a little pricey for what you get. Ok for quick overnight stay.

We moving in on January 29th 2025 live there for long term but there are not safely everything's,  bedroom base & mattress  is very noise when I get up is terrible and lounge sit is not comfortable.
Then what happened , on February 17th 2025 , I was fell off is broken knee go hospital because I can't see under the grass is hole.
I'm staying in hospital for 6 weeks.
The manager is not there in office not much always closed everyday for check in 😒 , she is not care of the caravan park.
So she keeping my clothes until I pay off , they are rip off the money.

We won't go back again
Please let all the people for hoilday not go there again.

We arrived at the park to have no one check us in, we proceeded to the room and were greeted with a large barking dog that was in a permanent residence opposite to our room, which looked like an absolute mess. Our children were not comfortable getting out of the car and we were not comfortable staying there with a baby and two tolddlers . The property did not respond to our requests or booking.coms.
Terrible service.

Manager Lucy was accommodating and provided great service. The holiday park offers budget accommodation near to the main attractions. The only improvement needed is the provisioning  of basic kitchen appliances like microwave, fridge and kettle. Lucy said that they plan to upgrade the whole kitchen so it might be different next time we visit.
Clean, lovely staff,  great location. Close to shops and lake and easy walk to beach over the bridge. Best Calamari nearby! Dog friendly too
Enjoyed our stay. Hope we can stay longer next time.
Simple clean accommodation
Not recommended for others

The place needs to better maintained... The cabin sheets looked old and unwashed. My dad's cabin lights were faulty as they were flickering. Once we complained to the owner, he was extremely rude and had threatened to kick us out of the caravan park on the very first night! A total of 10 or so families had come and stayed and were all treated with such disrespect
Fun times
The room was extremely clean and the service was superb! You can also park your boat and car just in front of your cabin which is very convenient. Highly recommended place to stay!

We stayed for Easter with families and friends. We had families staying in tents and some stayed in cabins. Value for money. Cabins were small with two bedrooms. More then enough for a short stay. Decently clean, has showers, heating and air-conditioning, kitchen supplies, TV, fridge, microwave, kettle, plates, cups, etc. Blankets, pillows, fitted sheets, towels are provided. Wifi connection. For campers, there is clean showers and toilets. Only thing is they close the bath room a certain time at night time. Has an shared eating and BBQ area. Friendly staffs. I recommend speaking to Lucy as she has been amazingly helpful from the day we booked in. She had looked after us very well. Thank you for making us feel very welcome. We will definitely come back when we are in the area.
Work in lake's entrance  gardening its amazing all year round

DONT SPEND YOUR MONEY HERE! they don't deserve it after how they have treated me.
Paul the guy that runs the place is a heartless person
I had a booking back in April but couldn't make it as my baby was sick. Before I could call n request for cancelation they took the money from my account and says I had 90 days to use my accomadation but every time I called to rebook Paul would tell me to send a text and he will call back
He never did. Every time I called he never picked up. So I complained to booking.  Com and even then he still hasn't bothered to respond.
$508 is a lot of money that I can't afford to loss as a vision impaired person trying took after a baby and pay bills.
This guy has no heart. I just want my money back
